title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bombay Shaving Company

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bombay Shaving Company
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
